caption: A screen recording displays a web browser open to a "True Random Number Service" page from RANDOM.ORG. The page features a "List Randomizer" result with a numbered list of names, including "1. Ron Wester," "2. Ron Wester," and "3. Ron Wester*." On-screen text includes an advisory stating, "We only operate services from the RANDOM.ORG domain. Other sites that claim to be operated by us are imposters." A sidebar shows a chat message from "nightbot" stating, "I think if you are a team signing Ohtani, you are going all in on everyone you can," alongside a link for a "BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE >>>." The bottom of the browser contains a banner for "CASEBREAKS.COM" featuring a red and white logo. As the sequence progresses, the "You have randomized this list" counter increases from "2 times" to "5 times" and finally to "10 times."
